description: Scenic Waterfront Views and Luxury Amenities Located in downtown San Diego, the 4-star San Diego Marriott Marquis and Marina offers breathtaking views of the waterfront and San Diego Bay. Guests can unwind in the outdoor swimming pool, hot tub, or indulge in a spa treatment. Culinary Delights and Dining Options Experience a culinary journey at the hotel's restaurants - from Asian fusion dishes at Roy’s Hawaiian Fusion Cuisine to modern American cuisine at Marina Kitchen. Don't miss the daily breakfast buffet and the convenience of a Starbucks coffee house on-site. Fitness and Nearby Attractions Stay active at the well-equipped 24-hour gym with complimentary fitness classes. Explore nearby at

name: Hilton San Diego Bayfront
description: Luxurious Waterfront Location Located next to the San Diego Convention Center and PETCO Park, Hilton San Diego Bayfront offers stunning views of San Diego Bay. The full-service spa and spacious, modern rooms with premium amenities ensure a comfortable stay. Poolside Relaxation and Dining Guests can unwind by the outdoor pool, indulge in poolside dining at The Pool Club, or enjoy cocktails at the Odysea Lounge. With two hot tubs and a Kid’s Splash Zone, the hotel provides ample opportunities for relaxation and fun in the sun. Culinary Delights with a View Indulge in California coastal cuisine at Hudson & Nash Waterfront Kitchen and Cocktails, where fresh regional ingredients shine. Enjoy
